ocr_mistral.text:
No. 105.072

Kentucky

Rose Chambers

n'd of
Aaron Chambers
Rank Pvt
Company G.
Regiment 118, U.S. C. Troops

Louisville Agency.
Rate per month $ 8
Commencing 7. Nov. 1864

Certificate dated 19. Dec. 1867
and sent to Claimant
Henderson
Ky

Act 14th July, 1862.
Book C Vol. 6 Page 21

Kemion Clerk.
